title: [Kconfig:65-70] CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY missing range constraint
description: Critic: Kconfig validation gap missed by both rounds. What: CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY has no 'range' constraint; accepts any int value (-2^31 to 2^31-1). Why it matters: Invalid frequencies (0, negative, >1GHz) could crash radio driver or cause undefined hardware behavior. Regional compliance depends on correct frequency band. Fix: Add range constraint e.g. 'range 150000000 960000000' covering common LoRa bands (150-960 MHz).
close_reason: Fixed - added 'range 150000000 960000000' constraint to CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY in subsys/lichen/Kconfig. Range covers all LoRa-capable bands (150-960 MHz) while rejecting invalid values like 0, negative, or >1GHz.
